purpose: Review candidates extracted from lab reference sources. Outputs are not promoted into app reference standards automatically.

sources.title: RCPA - Table 6 - Harmonised reference intervals for chemical pathology
notes: RCPA HTML is parseable, but output is review-only because licensing and table parsing need manual QA.
LN-RCPA/LOINC identifiers should be added to alias metadata separately.
